programme.title: Fist Of Fury
programme.desc: Bruce Lee's first chop-socky movie (made in Hong Kong) is action-filled and violent.

programme.title: Lone Wolf and Cub: Baby Cart to Hades
programme.desc: In a rare moment of compassion, Lone Wolf rescues a girl who has killed a pimp in self-defense. By his code, he is forced to endure being tortured to within an inch of his life. Lone Wolf takes to the road again, where his expertise is very much in demand, so much so that a would-be employer had already had a contract placed on him. The slayer with the baby cart proceeds down bloodstained paths to Hades.

programme.title: The Terminal
programme.desc: Eastern European visitor Viktor arrives in New York, only to find that his papers are no longer valid. Rules being rules, airport chief Dixon can't let Viktor into America, or let him leave.

credits.actor: Tom Hanks,Catherine Zeta-Jones,Stanley Tucci,Chi McBride,Diego Luna,Barry Shabaka Henley,Kumar Pallana,Eddie Jones,Jude Ciccolella,Corey Reynolds,Guillermo Díaz,Rini Bell,Stephen Mendel,Valera Nikolaev,Michael Nouri,Zoe Saldana

programme.title: The Rewrite
programme.desc: Keith Michaels, an Oscar-winning writer, teaches at the Binghamton University on the East Coast after losing his popularity in Hollywood and falls in love with Holly, a fellow teacher.

credits.actor: Hugh Grant,Marisa Tomei,Bella Heathcote,Allison Janney,J.K. Simmons,Chris Elliott,Aja Naomi King,Annie Q,Andrew Keenan-Bolger,Karen Pittman,Maggie Geha,Steven Kaplan

programme.title: Mune
programme.desc: Necross, the former guardian of the sun, turns evil and steals it. Now, Mune, Glim and Sohone, three friends, must work together to retrieve it from him.

credits.actor: Omar Sy,Izïa Higelin,Michael Gregorio,Benoît Allemane,Féodor Atkine,Joshua Ballard,Trevor Devall,Damien Boisseau

programme.title: The Way, Way Back
programme.desc: Duncan, a shy teenager, visits a beach house owned by his mother's boyfriend. Annoyed with everyone, he wanders away to a local water park and meets Owen, who helps him open up to the world.

credits.actor: Steve Carell,Toni Collette,Allison Janney,AnnaSophia Robb,Sam Rockwell,Maya Rudolph,Liam James,Rob Corddry,Amanda Peet,River Alexander,Zoe Levin,Nat Faxon,Jim Rash,Adam Riegler,Jeffery Ryan

programme.title: The Love Laugh Live Show
programme.desc: The host invites prominent personalities and engages them in candid conversations about their personal and professional lives.

programme.title: The Love Laugh Live Show
programme.desc: The host invites prominent personalities and engages them in candid conversations about their personal and professional lives.

programme.title: The Starving Games
programme.desc: In a deadly game orchestrated by President Snowballs, skilled archer Kantmiss Evershot, her lover Dale and tech-savvy ally Peter Malarkey must rely on their wits and skills to survive.

credits.actor: Brant Daugherty,Maiara Walsh,Cody Christian,Lauren Bowles,Alexandria Deberry,Nick Gomez,Theodus Crane,Trenton Rostedt,Eric Buarque,Joseph Aviel

programme.title: What to Expect When You're Expecting
programme.desc: Five couples from Atlanta buckle up to deal with the joys and sorrows of having a baby for the first time. However, they soon realise that parenthood demands a lot more than they anticipated.

credits.actor: Cameron Diaz,Jennifer Lopez,Elizabeth Banks,Chace Crawford,Brooklyn Decker,Anna Kendrick,Matthew Morrison,Dennis Quaid,Chris Rock,Rodrigo Santoro,Ben Falcone,Joe Manganiello,Tom Lennon,Amir Talai,Rob Huebel

programme.title: The Back-up Plan
programme.desc: A single woman comes across the man of her dreams on the very same day she becomes pregnant through artificial insemination.

credits.actor: Jennifer Lopez,Alex O'Loughlin,Michaela Watkins,Eric Christian Olsen,Anthony Anderson,Noureen DeWulf,Melissa McCarthy,Danneel Harris,Jennifer Elise Cox,Tom Bosley,Linda Lavin,Adam Rose

programme.title: Lay the Favorite
programme.desc: Ambitious about living the life of a cocktail waitress, a lap dancer tries her luck in Las Vegas. However, her life takes an unexpected turn after she falls in love with a sports gambler.

credits.actor: Bruce Willis,Rebecca Hall,Catherine Zeta-Jones,Vince Vaughn,Joshua Jackson,Laura Prepon,Frank Grillo,Wayne Pere,John Carroll Lynch,Corbin Bernsen

programme.title: Born to Fight
programme.desc: When a remote Thai village is overrun by terrorists armed with a nuclear missile, an elite undercover operative leads the most unique fighting force ever assembled in a heroic bid to save their nation.

programme.title: Modern Times

programme.title: Constantine
programme.desc: John Constantine has literally been to Hell and back. When he teams up with a policewoman to solve the mysterious suicide of her twin sister, their investigation takes them through the world of demon.

programme.title: Apocalypto
programme.desc: Set in the Mayan civilization, when a man's idyllic presence is brutally disrupted by a violent invading force, he is taken on a perilous journey to a world ruled by fear and oppression where a harrowing end awaits him. Through a twist of fate and spurred by the power of his love for his woman and his family he will make a desperate break to return home and to ultimately save his way of life.

programme.title: Justice League
programme.desc: Fuelled by his restored faith in humanity and inspired by Superman's selfless act, Bruce Wayne and Diana Prince assemble a team of metahumans consisting of Barry Allen, Arthur Curry and Victor Stone to face the catastrophic threat of Steppenwolf and the Parademons who are on the hunt for three Mother Boxes on Earth.

programme.title: Maximum Conviction
programme.desc: When former black ops operative Tom Steele and his partner Manning are assigned to decommission an old prison, they must oversee the arrival of two mysterious female prisoners. Before long, an elite force of mercenaries assault the prison in search of the new arrivals. As the true identities of the women are revealed, Steele realizes he's caught in the middle of something far bigger than he had imagined.

programme.title: G.I. Joe: The Rise of Cobra
programme.desc: From the Egyptian desert to deep below the polar ice caps, the elite G.I. JOE team uses the latest in next-generation spy and military equipment to fight the corrupt arms dealer Destro and the growing threat of the mysterious Cobra organization to prevent them from plunging the world into chaos.

programme.title: The Lost City
programme.desc: Dora, a girl who has spent most of her life exploring the jungle with her parents, now must navigate her most dangerous adventure yet: high school. Always the explorer, Dora quickly finds herself leading Boots (her best friend, a monkey), Diego, and a rag tag group of teens on an adventure to save her parents and solve the impossible mystery behind a lost Inca civilization.

programme.title: 300: Rise Of An Empire
programme.desc: Based on Frank Miller's latest graphic novel Xerxes and told in the breathtaking visual style of the blockbuster "300," this new chapter of the epic saga takes the action to a fresh battlefield--on the sea--as Greek general Themistokles attempts to unite all of Greece by leading the charge that will change the course of the war. "300: Rise of an Empire" pits Themistokles against the massive invading Persian forces led by mortal-turned-god Xerxes and Artemesia, the vengeful commander of the Persi.

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood Part II
programme.desc: John Rambo is released from prison by the government for a top-secret covert mission to the last place on Earth he'd want to return - the jungles of Vietnam.

programme.title: Now You See Me
programme.desc: One year after outwitting the FBI and winning the public’s adulation with their mind-bending spectacles, the Four Horsemen resurface only to find themselves face to face with a new enemy who enlists them to pull off their most dangerous heist yet.

programme.title: The Idle Class
